text: I would rather be considered

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: innovative.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: words.

text: I tend to

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: understand details of a subject but may be fuzzy about its overall structure.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: understand the overall structure but may be fuzzy about details.

text: When I am learning something new, it helps me to

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: think about it.

text: If I were a teacher, I would rather teach a course

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: that deals with facts and real situations.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: that deals with ideas and theories.

text: I prefer to get new information in

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: written directions or verbal information.

text: Once I understand

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: all the parts, I understand the whole thing.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: the whole thing, the parts fall into place.

text: In a study group working on difficult material, I am more likely to

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: sit back and listen.

text: I find it easier

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: to learn concepts.

text: In a book with lots of pictures and charts, I am likely to

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: look over the pictures and charts carefully.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: focus on the written text.

text: When I solve math problems, I

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: usually work my way to the solutions one step at a time.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: often just see the solutions but then have to struggle to figure out the steps to get to them.

text: In classes I have taken

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: I have usually gotten to know many of the students.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: I have rarely gotten to know many of the students.

text: In reading nonfiction, I prefer

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: something that teaches me new facts or tells me how to do something.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: something that gives me new ideas to think about.

text: I like teachers

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: who put a lot of diagrams on the board.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: who spend a lot of time explaining.

text: When I am analyzing a story or a novel

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: I think of the incidents and try to put them together to figure out the themes.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: I just know what the themes are when I finish reading and then I have to go back and find the incidents that support them.

text: When I start a homework problem, I am more likely to

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: start working on the solution immediately.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: try to fully understand the problem first.

text: I prefer the idea of

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: theory.

text: I remember best

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: what I hear.

text: It is more important to me that an instructor

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: lay out the material in clear sequential steps.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: give me an overall picture and relate the material to other subjects.

text: I prefer to study

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: alone.

text: I am more likely to be considered

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: careful about the details of my work.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: creative about how to do my work.

text: When I get directions to a new place, I prefer

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: written instructions.

text: I learn

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: at a fairly regular pace. If I study hard, I will 'get it.'

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: in fits and starts. I'll be confused for a while, then suddenly it all 'clicks.'

text: I would rather first

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: think about how I'm going to do it.

text: When I am reading for enjoyment, I like writers to

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: say things in creative, interesting ways.

text: When I see a diagram or sketch in class, I am most likely to remember

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: what the instructor said about it.

text: When considering a body of information, I am more likely to

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: focus on details and miss the big picture.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: try to understand the big picture before getting into the details.

text: I more easily remember

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: something I have thought a lot about.

text: When I have to perform a task, I prefer to

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: master one way of doing it.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: come up with new ways of doing it.

text: When someone is showing me data, I prefer

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: text summarizing the results.

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: work on (think about or write) the beginning of the paper and progress forward.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: work on (think about or write) different parts of the paper and then order them.

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: have 'group brainstorming' where everyone contributes ideas.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: brainstorm individually and then come together as a group to compare ideas.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: imaginative.

text: When I meet people at a party, I am more likely to remember

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: what they said about themselves.

text: When I am learning a new subject, I prefer to

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: stay focused on that subject, learning as much about it as I can.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: try to make connections between that subject and related subjects.

text: I am more likely to be considered

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: reserved.

text: I prefer courses that emphasize

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: abstract material (concepts, theories).

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: read a book.

text: Some teachers start their lectures with an outline of what they will cover. Such outlines are

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: very helpful to me.

option_b.label: b
option_b.text: does not appeal to me.

option_a.label: a
option_a.text: I tend to repeat all my steps and check my work carefully.

option_b.label: b

option_b.label: b
